headline: Phreesia Announces Refinancing of Bridge Loan with New $275 Million Revolving Credit Facility
summary: ALL-REMOTE COMPANY/WILMINGTON, Del., March 16, 2026--Phreesia, Inc. (NYSE: PHR) ("Phreesia" or the "Company") today announced the refinancing of its existing bridge loan (the "Bridge Loan") by its entry into a new credit agreement providing for a senior secured revolving credit facility (the "New Credit Facility") of up to $275 million in aggregate principal amount, with Capital One, National Association ("Capital One") serving as agent for the lenders. The Company borrowed approximately $92.2 m

headline: Mixed Investor Sentiment on Capital One Financial (COF), While Management Remains Confident
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) stands among the 11 best very cheap stocks to buy according to billionaires. With over 75% of covering analysts maintaining bullish ratings and a consensus price target of $275.00 (48.75% upside), investor opinion toward Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) remains positive, as evidenced by its outperformance relative to the industry […]

headline: 4 financial resources to tap when you think layoffs may be coming
summary: Preparing your finances in advance could put you in a better position to handle the sudden shock to your income.
